mapper.select: select id, user_name, latest_message, priority_level, status, update_time, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by, deleted from service_tickets where id = #{id} and deleted = false

select count(1) from service_tickets
and deleted = false
and (user_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or latest_message like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
and status = #{status}
mapper.update: update service_tickets set user_name = #{userName}, latest_message = #{latestMessage}, priority_level = #{priorityLevel}, status = #{status}, update_time = #{updateTime}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, deleted = #{deleted} where id = #{id} and deleted = false
